mapper.insert: INSERT INTO major ( major_id, name, active, college, room, tel, chair_professor, capacity, start_date ) VALUES ( #{majorId}, #{name}, #{active}, #{college}, #{room}, #{tel}, #{chairProfessor}, #{capacity}, #{startDate} )
mapper.select: SELECT m.major_id, m.name, m.capacity, m.room, m.tel, m.chair_professor, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM professor p WHERE p.major_id = m.major_id) AS professorCount FROM major m ORDER BY m.name ASC
